Fit all windows within 600 px height for small Haiku screens

to accommodate smaller Haiku displays.

commit.message:
Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Auto-Pipeline: file-based phase handoff for zero manual steps

Plan saves to .claude/squad-plan.json instead of context memory.
Execute reads the file — works even after /compact or /clear.
No token waste from re-injecting plan into context.

Flow: Explore → Plan(file) → compact → Execute(read file) → Verify → Report
User sees only the final report.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Added functions to ensure the existence of the Azure Blob container.

- Enhanced documentation in both example scripts to clarify usage and prerequisites.

commit.message:
security: MCP/Hooks信頼確認・shell=False化・proxyマスク

- MCP: プロジェクトレベル.eve-cli/mcp.jsonは初回信頼確認必須、
  コマンドallowlist(npx,node,python3等)、ハッシュ変更時は再確認
  信頼状態はtrusted_repos.jsonにリポジトリごとに保存
- Hooks: プロジェクトレベルhooks.jsonは初回信頼確認必須、
  shell=Trueを廃止しshlex.split+shell=Falseに変更、
  SessionStartイベントはプロジェクトフックからブロック、
  コマンドallowlist(echo,bash,python3,node,grep等)
- install.sh: proxy URL中のuser:pass資格情報をマスク表示
- README: セキュリティ注意事項を追記

commit.message:
fix: match session cookie name to NextAuth config

NextAuth hardcodes cookie name as "session-token" (no __Secure- prefix),
but the backend was conditionally prepending __Secure- for https URLs,
causing 401s in production.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Prevent duplicate guest records with same full name

When creating a guest, check if one with the same name already exists.
If found, update the existing record with any new non-empty fields and
return it instead of creating a duplicate. Also fix React key warning
in GuestSelector by using guest ID as key.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: retry on DB lock in OCR scan-pages endpoint

SQLite lock contention between the request handler and background OCR
tasks caused 500 errors when uploading textbook images. Now retries
up to 3 times with 1s delay, returning 503 only if all retries fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: remove registry-url to enable OIDC tokenless npm publishing (#19)

setup-node with registry-url auto-sets NODE_AUTH_TOKEN to GITHUB_TOKEN,
which npm sends to the npm registry causing 404. Removing registry-url
lets npm handle auth purely via OIDC trusted publisher flow.

feat(template): add sticker + emoji multimodal support

  as Discord CDN), Lottie (format_type 3) → text fallback [sticker: name]
- parse_emojis(content): replaces <:name:id> / <a:name:id> with the original
  reference immediately followed by a HATT marker, so model sees both the text
  reference and the image inline. Animated emojis use .gif, static use .webp.

commit.message:
refactor: extract HTTP abstractions into @goodie-ts/http (#72)

* refactor: extract HTTP abstractions into @goodie-ts/http (#49)

Create packages/http/ with framework-agnostic HTTP decorators
(@Controller, @Get, @Post, @Cors, @Validate), metadata types,
and HttpFilter interface for generic middleware discovery.

@goodie-ts/hono now depends on @goodie-ts/http and re-exports
all decorators — no user code changes required. The Hono plugin
discovers HttpFilter beans via baseTokenRefs and wires them as
sorted global middleware in createRouter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(hono): keep @Validate in hono package

@Validate is tightly coupled to @hono/zod-validator and is
Hono-specific. Only the metadata types (ValidateMetadata,
ValidationTarget) remain in @goodie-ts/http.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(hono): move ValidateMetadata/ValidationTarget back to hono

These types are only used by @Validate and the Hono plugin's
zValidator codegen — no reason to keep them in the http package.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve build failures in http/hono packages

- Add @types/node to @goodie-ts/http devDependencies
- Remove hasHttpFilterBeans() — baseTokenRefs is ClassTokenRef[] and
  cannot detect InjectionToken refs. Always generate HttpFilter wiring
  (no-op when no filters registered).
- Update test to expect HTTP_FILTER import

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update http CLAUDE.md — remove stale validate references

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: import HTTP_FILTER from @goodie-ts/hono in generated code

Generated code should import from @goodie-ts/hono (not @goodie-ts/http)
since users depend on hono, which re-exports http transitively.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR review feedback

- Add comment in generated code explaining `as any` cast on
  HttpFilter.middleware() (framework-agnostic `unknown` context vs
  Hono's MiddlewareHandler)
- Acknowledge symbol identity change in changeset (HONO_META symbols
  renamed to HTTP_META — internal, low-risk at 0.x semver)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

UX/UI 개선: 파티클 이펙트, 카운트업, 카운트다운, HUD 슬롯, 튜토리얼

P1-A: 사과 수집 시 빨강 픽셀 파티클 8~12개 버스트
P1-B: WIN 화면 별 파티클 20개 방사형 + 포인트 카운트업 800ms ease-out-cubic
P2-A: 일일 한도 달성 화면 KST 자정까지 카운트다운 HH:MM:SS
P2-B: HUD 사과 진행도 픽셀 슬롯 3칸 (수집 시 팝 하이라이트)
P3: 튜토리얼 레벨 — 첫 방문 시 AI 동결, 포인트 미지급, 완료 후 localStorage 기록

refactor: 将代码注释翻译为中文

- 翻译所有模块文档字符串为中文
- 翻译所有类和方法的文档字符串
- 翻译所有行内注释
- 保持专业技术术语一致性
- 代码逻辑未改变

涉及模块：
- memory: 工作内存、情节记忆、语义记忆、记忆项、记忆管理器
- storage: SQLite存储、ChromaDB存储、任务存储、基类
- agents: 基础代理、任务代理、内存管理代理、工具类
- task: 任务模型、任务管理器
- step: 步骤模型、评估器、卸载执行器
- skills: 技能模型、加载器
- mcp: MCP模型、注册中心、工具执行器
- utils: Token计数器、决策引擎
- config: 配置管理
- resource: 资源基类、加载器、处理器

commit.message:
Initial commit: publishing-github-vercel antigravity skill

commit.message:
redesign: modern landing page and dashboard UI

Landing page:
- Glassmorphic nav with sticky header
- Animated hero with gradient text and mock Notion board visual
- Step-by-step "How it works" with numbered cards
- Feature grid with icons
- Simplified 2-column pricing (Free + Pro)
- Social proof bar, CTA section, clean footer

Dashboard:
- Compact header with logo, breadcrumb, tier badge
- Spinner loading state instead of text
- Cleaner rule cards with status dots and subtle hover
- Refined modal with gray-50 inputs, rounded-xl, backdrop blur
- X button for delete instead of red block
- Better empty state with icon container

Global:
- Inter font via next/font/google
- Fade-up and float animations
- Glass card utility class
- Gradient text utility
- Custom checkbox icon
- Favicon set to logo.png

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

UX, anti-spam, and broadcast improvements

- Move birthday widget from guests tab to members tab in admin
- Voting page: remove phone/name fields; use IP address for dedup;
  compact member list layout (smaller padding, tighter gaps)
- POST /api/voting: IP-based dedup via hasVotedByIp/insertVoteByIp;
  add trust proxy for Nginx X-Forwarded-For support
- POST /api/send-voting: guests only (wa_enabled=1); members get one
  group message to WAHA_GROUP_ID (env var, skipped if empty);
  toast shows correct guest count + group indicator
- whatsapp.js: replace fixed 2000ms delay with random 1500-4000ms;
  add sendGroupMessage() for group chat delivery
- server.js: 7 voting + 5 contacts message variants, random pick per
  send via pickVariant() to reduce spam detection
- guest.html: WA consent checkbox required before form submission

When launching cinema from the individual reading plan page
(/lukusuunnitelma/:slug), the completion overlay now suggests
the next unread plan (e.g. "Raamattu vuodessa") just like it
does from the plans list page. Also supports ?cinema=1 query
param for auto-starting cinema when navigating between plans.

commit.message:
feat(contracts): add runtime ascension closure packet contract (AA-10.3 prep)

Introduce the runtime ascension closure packet — a formalized contract for
validating runtime readiness and launch sequencing:

- docs/runtime_ascension_closure_packet.md: Contract specification defining
  the ascension closure invariants: what conditions must hold before the
  runtime transitions from initialization to steady-state operation, the
  required evidence checkpoints, and the rollback doctrine if any gate fails.

- tests/runtime_ascension_closure_packet_contract.rs: Executable contract
  tests verifying the closure packet JSON artifact structure, required
  field presence, checkpoint ordering invariants, and gate-failure response
  schemas.

- scripts/run_runtime_ascension_closure_smoke.sh: Quick smoke test runner
  for the ascension closure contract.

This contract is preparatory work for AA-10.3 (runtime launch readiness
verification).

  early return after all useEffect hooks so hooks are always called in
  same order regardless of pathname

v0.3.4: robust citation lookup — inline metadata stripping, ligature fix, title extraction

citation_network.py:
- _fix_ligatures(): fix OCR ligature artifacts (fi→fi, fl→fl, ff→ff, Unicode codepoints)
- _smart_clean_query(): complete rewrite — inline regex stripping instead of line-based
  filtering; handles single-line collapsed abstracts from pdfplumber; strips journal
  headers, publisher names, DOIs, URLs, ISSNs, prices, copyright, dates, vol/issue/pp
- _looks_like_journal_header(): detect garbage titles containing journal metadata
- _try_extract_title(): extract real paper title buried inside garbled abstract text
- _prepare_queries(): generates 6+ query candidates; uses extracted title when stored
  title is journal garbage; tries 3 different abstract offsets (0, 80, 120 chars)
- _crossref_by_query(): tiered acceptance (score≥40 + ≥1 ref, or score≥15 + ≥3 refs)
- OpenAlex title search now tries cleaned title, raw title, AND extracted title

pdf_processor.py:
- _guess_title(): skip journal/publisher lines (ISSN, Vol/No/pp, publisher names,
  copyright, URLs, dates, journal headers like "Name91(2019)1437")
- _is_journal_line(): 20+ metadata patterns checked before accepting a title line

feat(ci): add WASM size budget gate, expand validation scripts, and perf regression checks

Extend the CI pipeline and local validation tooling for Browser Edition
quality gates:

- .github/workflows/ci.yml: Add "Build WASM size-budget artifact" step
  that compiles the wasm32-unknown-unknown release binary, measures raw
  and gzip sizes, and emits a structured JSON summary. Supports rch
  (remote compilation helper) when available, falling back to local cargo.
  Produces artifacts/wasm/release/asupersync.release.wasm for downstream
  size budget comparisons.

- scripts/check_perf_regression.py: Expand from basic threshold check to
  full WASM size budget enforcement with self-test mode (--self-test),
  structured JSON output, historical comparison, and configurable
  regression thresholds per metric ID (M-PERF-01A raw bytes, M-PERF-01B
  gzip bytes).

- scripts/check_wasm_typescript_package_policy.py: Major expansion from
  basic policy check to comprehensive package topology validation —
  verifies exports maps, subpath entries, TypeScript declaration
  coverage, dependency graph correctness, and cross-package reference
  resolution across the pnpm workspace.

- scripts/run_wasm_qa_evidence_smoke.sh: Expand from minimal smoke test
  to full QA evidence matrix runner — validates all evidence lanes
  (unit, integration, E2E, logging) produce the expected artifacts and
  exit codes.

- scripts/validate_npm_pack_smoke.sh: Expand npm pack validation to check
  tarball contents, manifest integrity, exports resolution, and
  installability assumptions for all four packages.

- WASM_SIZE_PERF_BUDGETS.md: Update budget documentation with current
  thresholds and metric ID references matching the CI gate.

commit.message:
Add Auto-Pipeline mode: fully automated plan→execute→verify

'best' mode now runs end-to-end without manual steps:
- Phase 1: Explore (haiku scan)
- Phase 2: Plan (opus subagent)
- Phase 3: Execute (opus parallel, 3-pass)
- Phase 4: Verify (build/test, auto-rollback)
- Phase 5: Report

No manual /clear needed — subagents provide fresh context.
No plan-and-stop — pipeline completes automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: rename server package src/ → agentlens_server/ for proper PyPI install

The internal package was named `src`, which meant the published wheel
installed a `src` top-level package into site-packages. This broke the
`agentlens-server` CLI entrypoint and could collide with other packages.

- Move server/src/ → server/agentlens_server/ (proper importable name)
- Update all internal imports from `from src.` → `from agentlens_server.`
- Update pyproject.toml: packages=["agentlens_server"], entry point
- Update Makefile and CI uvicorn commands
- Verified: `agentlens-server` CLI now works after `pip install`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.description: Chrome DevTools for AI Agents — real-time observability, hallucination detection, session replay, and cost tracking. MIT licensed.

commit.message:
!fleet: two-phase S3 protocol — all ships report, speaker assembles

Every ship publishes local fleet data (relay version, bot status,
process checks, git versions) to S3. Speaker polls for up to 5s,
then assembles a single response using liveFleet as fallback.

Guarantees exactly one reply with live data from all reachable ships.
Design doc updated in 06-commands.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: InfiniClaw
repository.description: Multi-bot orchestration built on NanoClaw

commit.message:
fix: resolve HTTP 500 on results page and stop polling bug

- audio_worker: change intermediate status 'audio_done' → 'processing'
  (audio_done was not a valid AnalysisStatus enum value, causing Pydantic
   ValueError and HTTP 500 every time frontend polled during audio processing)
- router/analyze: defensive try/except around AnalysisStatus() constructor
  so any future unknown status values fall back to PROCESSING instead of 500
- api.js: attach HTTP status code to thrown Error object (error.status)
- Results.jsx: retry polling on 5xx errors; only stop permanently on 4xx
  (prevents one transient 500 from halting all polling indefinitely)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Remove fake social proof and update domain to ianding.es

Remove specific numbers and implied existing customers (12 spots,
3 companies per cohort, YC startups on waitlist) to keep landing
page honest for pre-launch stage. Set default site URL to ianding.es.

commit.message:
feat: planet-style friend spheres and immersive mood backgrounds

- Friends appear as unique planets (rocky, gas, ringed, ice, lava, ocean)
  with GLSL shaders, orbiting the user's sphere in the Galaxy view
- Starfield background with orbit rings and auto-rotating camera
- Storm: real lightning bolts + heavy rain + sky illumination
- Rain: 120 drops + water ripples + fog layer
- Sun: light rays + floating sparkles + warm glow
- Calm: fireflies + floating leaves + aurora gradient
- Excitement: shooting stars + energy waves + glowing particles
- Anxiety: spinning vortex rings + pulsing particles
- Tired: moon + twinkling stars + night gradient
- Hopeful: shares the enhanced sun effect

commit.message:
fix: wrap upsert_conversation in try/except for all handoff/intake webhook paths

- manual_takeover, bilingual_handoff, human_handoff, lead_intake upsert calls
  now catch DB exceptions and log a warning instead of propagating unhandled,
  matching the pattern used by seller/buyer bots (finding 4A from review)
- docs: update production findings, handoff signoff, readiness report

repository.name: jorge_real_estate_bots
repository.description: Three AI real estate chatbots with GoHighLevel integration

commit.message:
fix: relax dedup limits to increase post throughput

- MAX_PREDICTIONS_PER_DAY: 24 → 48
- DUPLICATE_PREDICTION_HOURS: 6h → 2h (same token+direction)
- SIMILARITY_THRESHOLD: 0.7 → 0.85 (less aggressive blocking)

With 10 agents at 15-30min intervals, the old limits blocked
~84% of predictions. This should bring utilization from 16%
to a viable level.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 优化一键成片停止对话框的显示方式

- 使用 showLoading 方法显示停止对话框，不显示确认和关闭按钮
- 移除停止过程中显示的多余对话框
- 在 finally 块中自动关闭停止对话框

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Mask Clover API token in settings GET response

- GET /api/invoice/settings now returns masked token (••••last4)
- PUT handler skips token update if value contains mask characters
- Frontend uses server-side cloverConfigured flag instead of checking token

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(packages): add browser-core JS/TS glue layer and browser tracing module

Flesh out the consumer-facing JS/TS package artifacts:

- packages/browser-core/index.js: Add JavaScript entry point that wraps
  the wasm-bindgen raw exports (abi_fingerprint, abi_version, fetch_request,
  runtime_close, etc.) with ergonomic async initialization and error
  handling. Provides initWasm() for lazy WASM module loading.

- packages/browser-core/index.d.ts: TypeScript declarations for the
  browser-core public API surface, including InitInput union type,
  WasmRuntime interface, and all exported function signatures.

- packages/browser-core/types.d.ts: Standalone declaration-only type
  surface for @asupersync/browser-core/types subpath. Side-effect-free
  for tree-shaking safety when consumed by adapter packages.

- packages/browser-core/package.json: Update exports map, add main/types
  fields pointing to the new JS/TS entry points, update dependency
  declarations for wasm-pack output consumption.

- packages/browser-core/tsconfig.json: Adjust compiler options for the
  new declaration files.

- packages/browser/package.json: Add tracing subpath export.

- packages/browser/src/index.ts: Expand browser API surface with
  additional re-exports and initialization helpers.

- packages/browser/src/tracing.ts: New diagnostics module providing
  framework-agnostic tracing helpers for host integrations. Intentionally
  side-effect-free for tree-shake safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplify method page: replace cards with numbered list, tighten wording

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Seed weekly words into DB on startup if not already present

On connect, seedWeeklyWords checks existing weekId values and only
inserts weeks not yet in the collection — safe to run on every startup.
Ensures fresh Railway deployments have word data without manual scripts.
